summary: First-pass audit. Independently verified every closed security finding (S1 AllowAutoRedirect=false + manual FollowRedirect with fresh AuthGate, S2 SignRequest re-signs the next hop's destination, S3 AuthorizationHint on query-bearing URLs, S4.a _uri.IdnHost.ToLowerInvariant() at Absolute line 140, S4.b UriBuilder UserName/Password='' strip at constructor lines 81-86, O3 ReadAsByteArrayAsync → fresh ByteArrayContent with copied content headers at lines 399-413) and both codeanalyzer v4 finds (F1 Data<T>.From docstring now explicitly documents the lossy coercion; F2 orphan summary block removed). Architect's 7 stages all delivered: app.filesystem moved cleanly to app.types.path (no residue under PLang/app), Path is abstract with per-App ConcurrentDictionary Scheme registry registered in App ctor before any user code, FilePath/HttpPath both decorate [PathScheme], handler one-liners migrated, IFile/DefaultFileProvider deleted (only one comment marker remains), cross-scheme CopyTo/MoveTo tested in both directions in CrossSchemeTests. No PascalCase namespaces under PLang/app/. No Console.* writes in path types. Permission-class doc-comments correctly state persisted 'a' grants are permanent. Clean Debug rebuild; C# 2920/2920 pass; plang 204/204 pass, 0 stale. One latent informational nit (HttpPath.Raw still carries userinfo); F1/F2/F4 carry-forwards unchanged at their prior severities. Ship the branch.
